metadata.description: Skills for remote StarRocks development over SSH: connection management, build, deploy, and live-cluster inspection.

plugins.name: starrocks-dev
plugins.description: Drive a remote StarRocks dev host over SSH — set up the connection, build FE/BE, deploy/start a cluster, inspect a live cluster for perf/correctness, roll out binaries, and backport merged PRs to release branches (conflict-resolve + branch-image verify).
